Rarity: RARE New Item Small Cluster Jewel Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionNotableEnduringComposure Prefix: {range:0.5}AfflictionJewelSmallPassivesGrantLifeSmall3 Suffix: None Suffix: None Cluster Jewel Skill: affliction_armour Cluster Jewel Node Count: 2 LevelReq: 58 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Adds 2 Passive Skills {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 15% increased Armour Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +9 to Maximum Life 1 Added Passive Skill is Enduring Composure

PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^1For details on this build guide check out the written guide which is ALWAYS kept up to date: ^7https://www.poe-vault.com/guides/absolution-necromancer-build-guide
As hardswapping into Doryani is a rather painful experience, the decision was made to split the medium progression into two PoBs. One that sets up the core necesseties to make Doryani function, but doesn't drag the lightning resistance down to truly painful depths immediately.
Attributes and resistances across the rare pieces will sort you out. We left a resistance modifier on one of the ghastly eye jewels in the belt, as it makes reaching the cap a lot easier. Should you mana to cover these resistance modifiers without that jewel, and you can replace it with a damage jewel that will significantly boost your damage. However this is NOT a priority for you. Get the rest of the gear sorted.

Input.name: customMods
Input.string:
^1== CAP ALL YOUR ELEMENtAL RESISTANCES WITH GEAR == +21239% to Fire Resistanc +12329% to Cold Resistanc Chaos Resistance is preferable +75% chaos resistance
Malachai Rings +120% fire resistance +120% cold resistance
^6=== Utility Spectres (Not 100% uptime) === Baranite Cleric: Minions have 20% of physical damage added as extra lightning damage Take away " # " to enable non 100% uptime DPS debuff Primal Rex Matriarch #Nearby enemies take 50% increased lightning damage Arena Master: #Minions deal 20% increased damage #Minions have 20% increased cast speed
^6=== Animate Guardian === You have fortify Nearby allies have +10 Fortification Nearby allies have culling strike nearby allies have +50% to critical strike multiplier
